markdown:
Product Leader & Designer

# Build products people  _actually_ _love_  using.

I've spent years building tools for hundreds of thousands of People.
From individual creators to Fortune 100 Brands. Along the way, I've
learned a few things about what makes products truly resonate.


Email address
Get Insights

Join the newsletter. I'll email you right away so we can connect.


Shared insights at

Litmus LivePodcast MovementTravelConPodfestPhilly Tech Week

![Chris Vasquez portrait](https://hostedimages-cdn.aweber-static.com/OTc2MTMx/original/20f1530ed82744d9a30edc2b5714121a.png)

## Experiments aren't failures. They're data.

I'm the Chief Product Officer at AWeber. I work with product
managers and designers to craft experiences that help small
businesses and creators grow their audiences through email.


I'm passionate about two things: building products that let people
turn their passions into livelihoods, and sharing what I learn
along the way.


The center of that Venn diagram is experimentation as a way to
unearth insights of all kinds.


Join the Newsletter

## What You'll Learn From Me

Insights from years of building products for hundreds of thousands of people—from individual creators to Fortune 100 brands.

🧪

### Experimentation Mindset

How to treat experiments as data, not failures, and use insights to drive better decisions.

✉️

### Email Strategy

Practical tactics for growing your audience and turning subscribers into a real community.

💡

### Product Design

Lessons on crafting experiences that help people turn their passions into livelihoods.

![](https://clickpop.optin.com/forms/displays.htm?id=bJzs7MxsjJws)

Email addressGet Insights

Join the newsletter. I'll email you right away so we can connect.

## Recent Newsletters

Thoughts on product design, leadership, and building things that
matter.


[![Growing a product is scary](https://hostedimages-cdn.aweber-static.com/OTc2MTMx/original/38186b9f413542f8b8218209e03d7745.png)\\
**Growing a product is scary**\\
\\
You know that black hole feeling that can form in your stomach\\
when stepping out of your comfort zone? Yeah, me too. As I\\
prepare to head to the Small Business Expo...](https://clickpop.optin.com/newsletter/awlist5240406/MjY2MDkwOTg=/growing-a-product-is-scary.htm) [![Unwrapping 3 Gifts That Shaped My Life](https://hostedimages-cdn.aweber-static.com/OTc2MTMx/optimized/97990bfca8c94c7ba5da63ba3d4ee677.jpeg)\\
**Unwrapping 3 Gifts That Shaped My Life**\\
\\
A book full of magnets, an old computer, and a trip to the\\
most magical place on earth. My 40th birthday is coming up and\\
I'm boomeranging between existential dread...](https://clickpop.optin.com/newsletter/awlist5240406/MTk4MTc0MDQ=/unwrapping-3-gifts-that-shaped-my-life.htm) [![I can make any dragon](https://hostedimages-cdn.aweber-static.com/OTc2MTMx/original/b01209f9534343b6b9e20a5c91fd6469.jpeg)\\
**I can make any dragon**\\
\\
A lesson in confidence from a 10 year old artist. My 10 year\\
old niece Maddie wanted to start a savings account. She texted\\
me to talk through how she could start...](https://clickpop.optin.com/newsletter/awlist5240406/MTg3ODYyOTc=/i-can-make-any-dragon.htm) [![Barf](https://hostedimages-cdn.aweber-static.com/OTc2MTMx/optimized/20ceecdce72d48489ef921a8d1daf8fd.jpeg)\\
**Barf**\\
\\
How a sick dog relates to leadership. I have two little dogs,\\
one of whom is named Munchie. He's cute, sweet, and a great\\
companion; unfortunately he has an incredibly weak stomach...](https://clickpop.optin.com/newsletter/awlist5240406/MTc1OTYwMTU=/barf.htm)
